case_title: RICHARD PANG et al VS. LILY L. CHOI et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PANG, RICHARD TONG, TINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHOI, LILY L. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 141 CHICAGO WAY SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94112, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANG, RICHARD TONG, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, LILY L. DOES 1-30, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF PANG, RICHARD TONG, TINA AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, LILY L.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, LILY L.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, LILY L.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANG, RICHARD TONG, TINA SERVED MAY-05-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, LILY L.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANG, RICHARD TONG, TINA SERVED MAY-05-2011, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-30, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHOI, LILY L.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PANG, RICHARD TONG, TINA
